title: The Farmer's Treasure
content:
"Dig deeply, my Sons! through this field!
    There's a Treasure"--he died: unrevealed
    The spot where 'twas laid,
    They dug as he bade;
    And the Treasure was found in the yield.

    Productive Labour Is The Only Source Of Wealth
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Farmer's Treasure"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
